question.label: Next step from me
question.name: What do you need from me to make the next couple of weeks steadier?
question.description: Ends with a direct ask for support and next-step commitment without opening a new topic.

answer: I would start by naming one forum where I want clearer criteria, and what support I need to show up there.

assessment.note: He names a concrete next step and asks for clearer criteria in a specific forum, which signals slightly steadier footing and improved clarity.

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I would start by naming one forum where I want clearer criteria, and what support I need to show up there.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
I want clearer criteria, not reassurance.
I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.
If we can define the path precisely, I will commit to it.
I would start by naming one forum where I want clearer criteria, and what support I need to show up there.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.
